data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Continuous security assessments and audits to identify and patch vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Third-party security testing and vulnerability assessment frameworks.

data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: An additional layer of security to prevent unauthorized account access.
data.technical_spec: Password and SMS or email verification.

data.title: Robust Authentication Mechanisms
data.description: Authentication systems are in place to secure user access.

data.title: Malware Protection
data.description: Advanced detection and prevention mechanisms against malware.
data.technical_spec: Real-time threat intelligence and machine learning-based detection.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.description: Mechanisms to prevent unauthorized data access and leaks.
